texto: A perfume ought to punch you right on the nose ... I'm not going to sniff for three days to see if it smell or not? it has to have body, and what gives perfume body is the most expensive thing there is.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Tilar J. Mazzeo que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “A perfume ought to punch you right on the nose ... I'm not going to sniff for three days to see i…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, lifestyle, perfume, com foco em reflexao.
